name: Spanakopita-hg
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach well and chop it coarsely. Put it in a large pan.
2. Cover the pan and cook the spinach over low heat for 7-8 minutes or until wilted.
3. Drain well in a colander, pressing out moisture with a wooden spoon.
4. Beat the eggs until fluffy. Add the feta and cheddar cheese.
5. Heat oil in a pan and saute the onion until golden.
6. Add the spinach mixture to the onions and stir in pepper and oregano.
7. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Melt butter and brush a baking dish with it.
8. Lay one sheet of filo pastry on top, brushing with melted butter.
9. Place another 4 sheets of filo on top, brushing each layer with butter and tilting slightly so the corners fan out.
10. Reserve 3 sheets for later.
11. Pour in the spinach mixture and fold the pastry ends over it.
12. Butter the reserved sheets of filo and place them on top to cover the dish.
13. Slash the pastry a few times with a sharp knife to allow steam to escape.
14. Brush the top with more melted butter.
15. Bake for 45 minutes.
